gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Additionally, students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens and are clutching resumes inside branded folders.
At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards.
Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.
Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.
A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens and are clutching resumes inside branded folders; additionally, career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers shared quick pep talks near the coffee station.
At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.
Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

Tech companies are displaying demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms have stacked glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens while clutching resumes inside branded folders; additionally, career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers shared quick pep talks near the coffee station.
At the entrance, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.
Tech companies are displaying demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms have stacked glossy case study booklets on high tables.

At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; also, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens while clutching resumes inside branded folders; additionally, career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers shared quick pep talks near the coffee station.
At the entrance, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.
Additionally, tech companies are displaying demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms have stacked glossy case study booklets on high tables.

Additionally, alumni volunteers shared quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps. At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards. A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens and are clutching resumes inside branded folders; additionally, career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers shared quick pep talks near the coffee station, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.
At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers shared quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens and are clutching resumes inside branded folders, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
